name: Robert Accutrone
description:
Robert Accutrone (ロバート・アキュトロン, Robāto Akyutoron) is a Quincy and a member of the Wandenreich's Sternritter with the designation N.

· • · ───────── · • 𖥸 • · ───────── · • ·

Once there, he and the others create pillars of blue flame prior to engaging the Shinigami in battle. Soon, he is confronted by an 8th Division member which is you.
